text:
(In reply to Mike Karels from comment #149)
I don´t know how did you install your system but in my case when I try install from DVD-Rom or USB DVD-Rom error still occurred. Same result when I chose other usb ports then as the chosen one. After that when I found right one , system was installed without any problems and that stupid error messaga never shown up again. My advice for all users, make Bootable USB then trayng port by port. That will take some time but after that system will working and how I said that stupid message you will newer seen again anymore. That is really easy way but working. I tryed on 2 PC´s and it is OK.
